query:
SELECT 
  o.id,
  o.slug,
  o.name,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE organizationId = o.id) as contacts_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM systems WHERE organizationId = o.id) as systems_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM connectivityCache WHERE organizationSlug = o.slug) as connectivity_count
FROM organizations o
WHERE o.slug = 'RMCA';
